_doc: ROUNDS for Ednar's Cauldron. A 'day' is a run of 4 rounds: morning -> afternoon -> evening -> night. Night is always 1 boss. Each round defines either an explicit list of customer ids (hand-curated) or rules to randomly pick (rule-based). To add a day: copy any day block, rename the key, change values.
_format: Plain JSON. Lines starting with an underscore (_doc, _note) are comments — the game ignores them. Customer ids in 'customers' arrays must match keys in characters.json exactly (case-sensitive).

_global_settings._note: Settings that apply to every day in the game. The user is likely to flip COMPOSURE_REST_BETWEEN_ROUNDS to 0 later (so composure only refills between full days, not between rounds within a day). Just change the number and the game adapts.

day_1._note: DAY 1 — fully hand-curated for tutorial reliability. Mildred opens (gentlest customer, no trait). Greta arrives in afternoon (inspiring trait teaches that traits aren't always bad). Evening introduces real pressure with Wendelina + Crispin together. Night is Grimdrek by default.
day_1.name: Day 1
day_1.subtitle: Opening for Business

morning._note: 2 customers, both difficulty 1, both no-trait. Pure tutorial.

afternoon._note: 2 customers. Pemberton (grumpy merchant) introduces patience pressure. Greta (inspiring) teaches that some traits help you.

evening._note: 3 customers — first time the player sees a full queue. Wendelina (high stats, no trait), Crispin (intimidating), Ardo (skittish). Player has to triage.

night._note: Single boss. Grimdrek by default. To swap: change to ['carmilla'] or ['royal_envoy'].

day_2._note: DAY 2 — example rule-based day. Every round picks customers from pools by difficulty and time_of_day tag.
day_2.name: Day 2
day_2.subtitle: Word Gets Around

night._note: Random boss from any difficulty-5 customer with the 'night' tag.

day_3._note: DAY 3 — HYBRID example. Morning + afternoon are random. Evening is hand-curated. Night is a fixed boss.
day_3.name: Day 3
day_3.subtitle: The Reckoning

evening._note: Hand-curated: two difficulty-4 customers in one round. A 'pre-boss gauntlet.'

night._note: Fixed boss for narrative reasons (the Crown summons you on Day 3).

_template_for_new_days._note: Copy this block, rename the key (e.g. 'day_4'), fill in values, and move it into the 'days' object above. Each round needs a 'mode' of either 'curated' (with a 'customers' array of ids) or 'random' (with 'count' and 'rules'). Available rule keys: max_difficulty (1-5), min_difficulty (1-5), must_include_tag ('morning'/'afternoon'/'evening'/'night'), required_trait (a trait id, forces at least one customer with that trait), exclude_ids (an array of customer ids that cannot be picked).
